response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed video intro (00:00 - 02:18) to identify the concert as 'hololive GAMERS fes. Cho-Cho-Cho-Cho GAMERS'.
2. Identified the song performing from 02:18 onwards as 'We are GAMERS !!!!' based on the event title and audio.
3. Search query used: '"We are GAMERS !!!!" Hololive lyrics'.
4. Successfully retrieved Romanized Japanese and English translation lyrics for 'We are GAMERS !!!!' from multiple search results (e.g., Lyrical Nonsense, Uta-Net).
5. Constructed JSON with scene breakdown and lyrics.
response.global_summary: The video begins with an intro screen for the 'hololive GAMERS fes. Cho-Cho-Cho-Cho GAMERS' event, followed by a live concert performance of the song 'We are GAMERS !!!!' by the hololive Gamers unit.

scenes.description: Intro screen displaying event information for 'hololive GAMERS fes.'
Live concert performance of 'We are GAMERS !!!!' by the hololive Gamers members in front of a large, cheering crowd with lightsticks.
scenes.performer_in_video: hololive Gamers (Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, Inugami Korone)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
「ホロライブゲーマーズ!!!!」
(G.A.M.E.R.S) We are GAMERS !!!!×2
こーん!とキツネが登場
白髪ケモミミ白上フブキです
スッ込んでちゃ始まらない
君もすこん部に入部しなさい
Hi Friends!! (Yeah!!)
Hi Friends!! (Yeah!!)
古今東西 コーン茶をちょーだい
AIじゃないし
得意はMC
赤い恋より金の鯉が推し...
(歌詞は続きます)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(G.A.M.E.R.S) We are GAMERS!!!! x2
Kon! A fox appears!
White-haired, beast ears, it's Shirakami Fubuki!
It won't start if you're just sitting there!
Come on, join the Sukonbu fan club!
Hi Friends!! (Yeah!!)
Hi Friends!! (Yeah!!)
From ancient times to the present, give me some corn tea!
I'm not an AI!
My specialty is MC!
My favorite is golden carp rather than red love...
(The rest of the lyrics continue in this style)
